name: Lemon Herb Marinated Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Mazola RightBlend Corn & Canola Oils
1 pound boneless, skinless chicken breast halves
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the first five ingredients.
2. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
3. Cover and let stand at room temperature no longer than 30 minutes, turning once.
4. Broil for 10 minutes or until thoroughly cooked, turning once.
Makes 4 servings.
Each serving (with chicken) provides: 200 calories, 25 grams protein, 1 gram carbohydrates, 10 grams total fat, 4 grams polyunsaturated fat, 2 grams saturated fat, 70 milligrams cholesterol, 330 milligrams sodium.
